title: Sweet-and-Sour Cauliflower Curry
excerpt: Ingredients 1 kg lamb shanks 1 onion 30 ml oil 5 potatoes half a cauliflower broken into 'florets' 1 tin tomato puree 60 ml Worcestershire sauce 60 ml vinegar 500 ml stock 4 whole cloves 80 ml curry powder 20 ml turmeric 30 ml cumin 80 ml apricot jam salt and pepper Method Cut the onions …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 kg lamb shanks
  • 1 onion
  • 30 ml oil
  • 5 potatoes
  • half a cauliflower broken into 'florets'
  • 1 tin tomato puree
  • 60 ml Worcestershire sauce
  • 60 ml vinegar
  • 500 ml stock
  • 4 whole cloves
  • 80 ml curry powder
  • 20 ml turmeric
  • 30 ml cumin
  • 80 ml apricot jam
  • salt and pepper

Method

Cut the onions into rings and fry in the oil.

Fry the cumin together with the onions.

Now fry the meat until slightly browned.

Mix the rest of the ingredients except the cauliflower, and add to the meat.

Let it simmer slowly until the meat is tender.

Add the cauliflower pieces and let it cook through nicely.

Easy
